zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Almott II於1414年出生在英國素福爾可可廷 聖 瑪麗 煙雨 可廷 哥吉拉 沙智 安德 聖 奧拉福時，他的父親Sir Thomas Almott I20歲，母親Lady Thomas Almott I14歲。他和Lady Bridget Thorne至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1459年6月2日在英國素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Almott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ostensibly a topographic name from any of a large number of places called in Old English as ‘the old cottage’ (Old English (e)ald + cot(e)). In fact, however, it is generally an altered form of Alcock , in part at least for euphemistic reasons.

History: Louisa May Alcott (1832–88), author of Little Women (1869), was the daughter of Amos Bronson Alcott (1799–1888), who had changed the surname from Alcox. The family trace their descent from an Alcocke family who emigrated from England to MA with John Winthrop (see Winthrop ) in 1630.

variants.name: Alcock
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Alcok, a pet form of any of the many medieval personal names beginning with Al-, especially Alan and Alexander. The Middle English hypocoristic suffix -cok (see Cocke ) was very commonly added to personal names in Middle English: compare for example Hancock and Wilcock .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Almott II was born in 1414, in Creeting St Mary with Creeting All Saints and St Olave, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Thomas Almott I, was 20 and his mother, Lady Thomas Almott I, was 14. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Lady Bridget Thorne. He died on 2 June 1459, in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England, at the age of 45.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Almott II(이)가 1414년 영국 수폴크 크릿잉 스트 메리 위스 크릿잉 앨 세인츠 앤드 스트 올레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Almott I(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Thomas Almott I(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Lady Bridget Thorne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 6월 2일 영국 수폴크 크릿잉 스트 피터에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Almott II родился в 1414 г. в местности критинг ст мэри вит критинг алл сеинц анд ст олав, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Almott I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Thomas Almott I, 14. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Lady Bridget Thorne. Он умер 2 июня 1459 г. в местности критинг ст питир, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Almott II nació en 1414, en Creeting St Mary with Creeting All Saints and St Olave, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Almott I, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Thomas Almott I, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Lady Bridget Thorne. Murió el 2 de junio de 1459, en Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
